bookingPolicies.description: Membership required. Court time is priced per 75-minute block, separately for singles and doubles, with lower early-morning, late-evening, and summer rates, plus $15 per guest. [See current rates](https://tenniscentersandpoint.com/tennis-court-rentals/).
bookingPolicies.confirmationNotice: You should receive an email from Tennis Center Sand Point with reservation confirmation.
